title: FAMA: The First Large-Scale Open-Science Speech Foundation Model for English and Italian
relevance_note: Read the full parsed paper: FAMA is a pure ASR/speech-translation (speech-to-text) foundation model, trained and evaluated only on WER/COMET. No TTS, VC, or SCA component. Likely a filter-stage false accept; sent to review queue for a corpus-inclusion decision rather than rejected outright.
venue_detail: CLiC-IT 2025: 11th Italian Conference on Computational Linguistics (Cagliari, Italy, Sep 2025)

generation_history.note: Ingest reverted same day: paper is out-of-scope ASR/ST, no TTS/VC/SCA component. Moved to status: review.
